assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Module allows a low risk request and returns headers
assertionResults.title: allows a low risk request and returns headers

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Module blocks a high risk request after 10 tries
assertionResults.title: blocks a high risk request after 10 tries

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Module isolates tiers: exhausting high risk does not exhaust low risk
assertionResults.title: isolates tiers: exhausting high risk does not exhaust low risk

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Module isolates IPs: exhausting limit for IP A does not affect IP B
assertionResults.title: isolates IPs: exhausting limit for IP A does not affect IP B

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Module disables completely if RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED is 0
assertionResults.title: disables completely if RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED is 0

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Integration (Middleware Direct) returns a 429 Too Many Requests response after exceeding the limit on high risk endpoints
assertionResults.title: returns a 429 Too Many Requests response after exceeding the limit on high risk endpoints

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Integration (Middleware Direct) does not rate limit non-auth endpoints
assertionResults.title: does not rate limit non-auth endpoints

assertionResults.fullName: Auth Rate Limit Integration (Middleware Direct) different IPs have isolated limits
assertionResults.title: different IPs have isolated limits

assertionResults.fullName: Validation Layer Integration JSON Body Validation POST /api/tasks returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR when required fields are missing
assertionResults.title: POST /api/tasks returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR when required fields are missing

assertionResults.fullName: Validation Layer Integration JSON Body Validation POST /api/policies returns 400 on invalid JSON payload
assertionResults.title: POST /api/policies returns 400 on invalid JSON payload

assertionResults.fullName: Validation Layer Integration JSON Body Validation PUT /api/risks/123 returns 400 on out-of-bounds numbers
assertionResults.title: PUT /api/risks/123 returns 400 on out-of-bounds numbers

assertionResults.fullName: Validation Layer Integration Multipart Form Validation POST /api/evidence returns 400 when attempting to upload without required fields
assertionResults.title: POST /api/evidence returns 400 when attempting to upload without required fields

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRisk computes score = likelihood * impact
assertionResults.title: computes score = likelihood * impact

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRisk emits RISK_CREATED event after creation
assertionResults.title: emits RISK_CREATED event after creation

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRisk defaults likelihood=3 and impact=3 when not provided
assertionResults.title: defaults likelihood=3 and impact=3 when not provided

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRisk sets createdByUserId from context
assertionResults.title: sets createdByUserId from context

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRiskFromTemplate uses template defaults when no overrides provided
assertionResults.title: uses template defaults when no overrides provided

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases createScopeRiskFromTemplate allows overrides to replace template fields
assertionResults.title: allows overrides to replace template fields

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases updateScopeRisk recomputes score when likelihood or impact change
assertionResults.title: recomputes score when likelihood or impact change

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases updateScopeRisk emits RISK_UPDATED event
assertionResults.title: emits RISK_UPDATED event

assertionResults.fullName: Risk Usecases setScopeRiskStatus emits RISK_STATUS_CHANGED event with old and new status
assertionResults.title: emits RISK_STATUS_CHANGED event with old and new status

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext returns tenant context when membership exists (by slug)
assertionResults.title: returns tenant context when membership exists (by slug)

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext returns tenant context when membership exists (by tenantId)
assertionResults.title: returns tenant context when membership exists (by tenantId)

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext throws notFound when tenant does not exist
assertionResults.title: throws notFound when tenant does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext throws forbidden when user has no membership
assertionResults.title: throws forbidden when user has no membership

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext throws notFound when no identifier provided
assertionResults.title: throws notFound when no identifier provided

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext returns correct permissions for ADMIN role
assertionResults.title: returns correct permissions for ADMIN role

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext returns correct permissions for READER role
assertionResults.title: returns correct permissions for READER role

assertionResults.fullName: resolveTenantContext returns correct permissions for AUDITOR role
assertionResults.title: returns correct permissions for AUDITOR role

assertionResults.fullName: resolveScopeContext returns scope context with inherited tenant role when no scope membership
assertionResults.title: returns scope context with inherited tenant role when no scope membership

assertionResults.fullName: resolveScopeContext returns scope context with scope role override
assertionResults.title: returns scope context with scope role override

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Risk SELECT Isolation Tenant A context cannot see Tenant B risks even without WHERE filter
assertionResults.title: Tenant A context cannot see Tenant B risks even without WHERE filter

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Risk INSERT Isolation Cannot insert a risk belonging to Tenant B while in Tenant A context
assertionResults.title: Cannot insert a risk belonging to Tenant B while in Tenant A context

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Risk DELETE Isolation Cannot delete Tenant B risks from Tenant A context
assertionResults.title: Cannot delete Tenant B risks from Tenant A context

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Policy SELECT Isolation Tenant A context only sees its own policies
assertionResults.title: Tenant A context only sees its own policies

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Policy INSERT Isolation Cannot insert a policy under Tenant B while in Tenant A context
assertionResults.title: Cannot insert a policy under Tenant B while in Tenant A context

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Evidence SELECT Isolation Tenant B context only sees its own evidence
assertionResults.title: Tenant B context only sees its own evidence

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Control with nullable tenantId Tenant A can see both global (null tenantId) and its own controls
assertionResults.title: Tenant A can see both global (null tenantId) and its own controls

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation Control with nullable tenantId Tenant B can see global controls but NOT Tenant A-specific controls
assertionResults.title: Tenant B can see global controls but NOT Tenant A-specific controls

assertionResults.fullName: Postgres RLS Tenant Isolation No tenant context set Querying without app.tenant_id returns zero rows from tenant-scoped tables
assertionResults.title: Querying without app.tenant_id returns zero rows from tenant-scoped tables
